output: Implemented batch 2. `VideoEditorShell` now adds a condensed `Shots` tab, defaults to `shots` off `/tools/travel-between-images` and `preview` on that route, passes `highlightedShotIds` from `useSelectedShotIds()` plus `projectId` from project context, and keeps the preview host mounted behind a CSS-hidden preview pane. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx` and `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_2.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `VideoEditorShell` to add a condensed `shots` tab, default it to `shots` off `/tools/travel-between-images` and `preview` on that route, pass `highlightedShotIds` from `useSelectedShotIds()` and `projectId` from `useProjectSelectionContext()`, and keep the condensed preview slot mounted behind a CSS-hidden preview pane so the Remotion host persists. The preview overlay is not rendered when the Shots tab is active. Preview persistence coverage was updated and passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified in code and test coverage that the preview host remains a single mounted DOM node while the compact shell defaults to the Shots tab off travel pages and the Preview tab on travel pages. The preview pane is CSS-hidden rather than unmounted, and the condensed branch skips rendering `previewOverlay` when `condensedRightPanel === 'shots'`.
